nasb.text: “You shall also say to this people, ‘Thus says the Lord, “Behold, I set before you the way of life and the way of death.

esv.text: “And to this people you shall say: ‘Thus says the Lord: Behold, I set before you the way of life and the way of death.

cnv.text: 耶和華又吩咐耶利米：“你要對這人民說：‘耶和華這樣說：看哪！我把生命的路和死亡的路擺在你們面前。

ccb.text: “耶利米啊，你要告诉百姓，‘耶和华说，看啊，我把生命之路和死亡之路摆在你们面前，
